description: Generate a React docs site from completed videos
query: Generate a docs site for my demo app. It's at /home/user/projects/demo-app
expected_behavior: Confirms the site was created at /home/user/projects/demo-app/.video-docs/docs/
Reports that the dev server opened at http://localhost:5173/
Mentions that adding more videos is done by re-running the same command after recording new flows
Does NOT manually edit App.tsx or sections.ts — those are always regenerated by the script
